violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided during the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the sandwich prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixer, shelving under the front counter and deli slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The ceiling tiles above the oven and food prep area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Garlic in oil was observed held at 62 degrees Fahrenheit on prep table. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item was voluntarily disposed during time of inspection. PIC made new pan of garlic in oil and moved into prep unit to hold under mechanical refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixer, shelving under the front counter and deli slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The ceiling tiles above the oven and food prep area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Per interview with PIC sauce was not heated to 165 before placing in hot hold well. Sauce was moved to stove and reheated to 165 or above before placing back at hot hold unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The screen doors to the outside, located in the at front, both side doors of building were observed not tight-fitting. Screen doors must be tight fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets On North American Pizza Unit (right side door) was observed in poor repair Gasket needs to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2023
